title: Sticky Keys (AutoRun)
description: This Mod allows you to simulate holding down your mousebuttons or keyboard buttons
body:
Did you sometimes play other games where for example autorun exists?

Just want to grab a drink but still want to drive with your boat?

Want to stay afk on a Cobble Gen but dont want to hold down your left Mousebutton?

### **This Mod is perfect for you!**

Basically all you do is just hold down whatever button you want for example W and then just press the Hotkey _(which you select in the keybinds settings)_ and it is done! now you walk forward forever, you can also always just press the keybind again or esc to exit/stop it

You can also use multiple keys at once for example W and Leftmouse button at the same time!
